name: Status Gasless Risk Oracle
description: An autonomous confidential risk desk analyst that analyzes crypto markets via Venice AI (private inference), stores the encrypted findings perfectly on Filecoin (Agentic Storage SDK), dynamically resolves on-chain targets via ENS, and broadcasts the final IPFS CID completely gas-free to the Status Network.

compute_constraints.gas_efficiency: Strictly 0 ETH execution fee via Status Gasless L2
compute_constraints.storage_efficiency: Lightweight CID stored on-chain, dense data stored on Protocol Labs IPFS
compute_constraints.inference_budget: Tokenized private inference via Venice VVV
